sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n9921" key="a)nti/drasis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντί-δρᾱσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n9921.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">retaliation,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Anon.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inRh.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">91.30</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
